dvids.title: 21st Operational Weather Squadron and Fleet Weather Center Aviation Detachment Freedom 250 Shout-out
dvids.desc: United States Airmen and Sailors assigned to the 21st Operational Weather Squadron and Fleet Weather Center Aviation Detachment deliver a shout-out in honor of the 250th birthday of the United States at Kapaun Air Station, Germany. The 21st OWS and FWCAD provide weather support to U.S. European Comm
